suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update the `worker` and `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` droids (or the inherited model mapping they use) to reference a valid model identifier instead of `custom:GPT-5.4`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This scrutiny rerun attempted to launch review subagents for all three completed milestone features via `Task`, and every launch exited immediately with `Invalid model: custom:GPT-5.4`. The two existing round-1 review reports were reused and the new `mod-library-perf-guardrail-timeout-fix` review was completed locally to unblock synthesis, but the intended review-subagent path remains broken until that model mapping is corrected.
